settings.heading: Collection highlights

settings.title: Use-case overview
settings.copy: Use this block for collection-specific product guidance, setup fit, or workflow positioning.

settings.title: Technical guidance
settings.copy: Use this block for port mix, power, compatibility, or platform-specific considerations.

settings.title: Support continuity
settings.copy: Use this block to route into manuals, downloads, troubleshooting, or compatibility guidance.

settings.question: What information should live here later?
settings.answer: Use this section for collection-level buying guidance, compatibility questions, or general setup questions that apply across multiple products.

settings.question: Should this replace product-level FAQs?
settings.answer: No. Keep this section focused on category-wide guidance while product-specific details remain on the PDP or in structured support content.

settings.heading: Need product help before purchasing?
settings.copy: Use this space to route shoppers into compatibility, compare, or direct support without breaking the collection flow.
